Medical Emergency?

If you're experiencing a medical emergency, please contact your local emergency services immediately.

US/CA: 911 UK: 999 AU: 000

Quick Questions?

How much does a consultation cost?

Initial consultations are completely free with no obligations.

How long does the process take?

Second opinions: 5-7 days. Medical tourism planning: 2-3 weeks.

Do you work with insurance?

We provide documentation for insurance reimbursement where applicable.

Is my information secure?

Yes, we use bank-level encryption and are HIPAA compliant.

Our Global Presence

While we operate globally, our main coordination centers ensure seamless support worldwide.

Headquarters

Mumbai, India

Global operations and medical coordination center

North America

Toronto, Canada

Regional support for US and Canadian patients

Europe & Middle East

Dubai, UAE

Regional support for European and Middle Eastern patients
